DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2024 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: Defendant The Grand Lodge of Free & Accepted Masons of California's Demurrer to Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant The Grand Lodge of Free & Accepted Masons of California's unopposed demurrer to Plaintiff's complaint is sustained without leave to amend.

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Park. (301/RCE)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT THE GRAND LODGE OF FREE & ACCEPTED MASONS' OF DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The Dale declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred "in person, by telephone, or by video conference" in compliance with CCP 430.41. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with the code. The response to the complaint is now due April 24, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
